name: OpenClaw guard — MDC_architecture.md
what_it_solves: '/mnt/user-uploads/MDC_architecture.md' is the OpenClaw project's MDC documentation — NOT CrisPRO. It appears in /mnt/user-uploads because the user uploaded it for a different program.
how_it_solves: Guard entity: any downstream ingestor that iterates /mnt/user-uploads and sees MDC_* files MUST NOT treat them as CrisPRO architecture.
why_it_exists: Previous sessions conflated MDC architecture with CrisPRO layer stack — this guard entity prevents recurrence.
gaps_still_open: This file remains in /mnt/user-uploads; keep guard active until the user removes it or explicitly maps it.
